hero.title: Xarala yu kawe ngir liggéey bu mucc ayib ✦
hero.description: Man Wistant laa, moom mbirum xarala (Software Engineer). Damay defar ay jumtukaay yu dëgër ci Web, Mobile ak Desktop.

about.title: Sama Xalaat
about.content: Duma bind ay code kesse; damay sàkk ay system yu dëgër ngir gaawaay ak mbaxu jëfandikukaay. Sama yéene mooy wàññi jaxaso gi joxe lu yomb, lu set te gaaw ci platform yépp.

seo.title: Ci man Wistant | Software Engineer
seo.description: Xamle ki di Wistant, Software Engineer bu mën ci liggéeyu Web, Mobile, ak Desktop.
seo.keywords: Software Engineer, Full-Stack Developer, Mobile, Desktop, TypeScript

skills.title: Jumtukaay yi
skills.description: Li may jëfandikoo bés bu nekk ngir liggéey lu baax.

seo.title: Wistant | Portfolio ak Liggéey
seo.description: Xool sama liggéey yu mujj ak Next.js, NestJS, ak TypeScript.
seo.keywords: Portfolio, Projects, TypeScript, Next.js, Web Development

blog.title: Bind ak Njàng
blog.description: Xalaat ci xarala ak lu may jàng bés bu nekk.

contact.title: Liggeeyandoo
contact.subtitle: Am nga xalaat walla bëgg nga waxtaan?
contact.description: Maa ngi fi ngir waxtaan ci yeneen mbir yu bees wala liggeeyandoo.

hackathons.title: Hackathons
hackathons.subtitle: Bëgg a sàkk
hackathons.description: Dama bokk ci ay hackathons yu bare. Dafa neex a gis ñu bëgg code dajale seen xalaat defar lu bees ci wikèn bi.

og.headline: Software Engineer
og.description: Njàngum xarala ngir Web, Mobile ak Desktop.

seo.title: Wistant | Software Engineer
seo.description: Wistant, Software Engineer ci Senegal ak Cameroun.
